heading:
Guro Alvin
Penaflor
narrative: Before finding Lapunti, I wandered the halls of different martial art schools — Karate, Judo and Combat Judo, Aikido, Wonwhado, and Tai Chi. Each left its mark, but none felt like home.

In 2010, I found Lapunti Arnis De Abanico. The art's blend of fluid striking, precise footwork, and deep principle-based teaching resonated in a way nothing else had. This is the art I will practice towards my old age.
Now on a path towards what my teachers have set me on to, and which they themselves have embarked on: finding my own Lapunti.

credentials.promotedBy: Promoted by the art's Supreme Grandmaster, SGM Undo Caburnay, in 2015

timeline.event: Training in various martial arts: Karate, Judo/Combat Judo, Aikido, Wonwhado, Tai Chi
Began training in Lapunti Arnis De Abanico; co-founded the UP Diliman training group
Group officially recognized as a Lapunti chapter by SGM Undo Caburnay and LADAI Headquarters
Promoted to Guro (Lakan Apat) by SGM Undo Caburnay during the annual Club Seminar and Promotions
Active instructor at Lapunti Karilyon, UP Diliman
